# ArcAI

> ArcAI (Ask, Reflect, Create) is a free multimodal AI assistant by Win The Night Productions. Realtime voice conversations, image generation, code canvas, writing tools, music player and persistent memory in one app.

ArcAI is the most affordable alternative to ChatGPT, Claude and Gemini. Free tier includes 30 messages/day, 3 voice sessions and 5 image generations. Pro is $12/month for unlimited use.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Chat with Arc — voice, images, code and writing in one place.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free tier and Pro plan ($12/mo or $115.20/yr).
- [Downloads](/downloads): Native apps for macOS, Windows (beta), iOS and Android.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Central hub for chats, canvases, images, deploys, music and memory.
- [Support](/support): Open a support ticket or get help.

## Optional

- [Settings](/dashboard/settings): Account, accent color, voice and subscription settings.
- [Unsubscribe](/unsubscribe): Manage email preferences.
